# Celonis

Enterprise process mining and execution management platform. Surfaced in the June 2026 ODT competitive analysis as a player in the DTO/process-intelligence space. Enterprise-grade pricing and Salesforce-scale deployment assumptions make it out-of-scope for Janus at current stage. Not evaluated further.
